_comment: Snippet to merge into your MCP client config (e.g. claude_desktop_config.json).

ghidra-headless._comment: Talks to the headless ghidra-mcp HTTP server started by entrypoint.sh on :8089

shell._comment: Generic shell command execution inside the container — gives access to all CLI tools

python._comment: Python REPL with angr, pwntools, z3, lief, capstone pre-loaded

fuzz._comment: Fuzzing harness — scaffold AFL++ or honggfuzz sessions, run smoke tests, triage crashes

angr._comment: Symbolic analysis — CFG overview, symbolic path finding, function listing
